chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-7282 of 2018 Date Order with Signature of Judge D/o matter For hearing of CMA No. 2600/2025 (Restoration) 06-03-2025 Syed Qasim Ali (son of Petitioner) present in person Mr. Iftikhar Ahmed Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General By consent the application is allowed and the petition is restored. This petition is pending since 2018 and admittedly the petitioner is deceased. While learned counsel seeks to rely on a power of attorney, however, respectfully the power of attorney does not survive the demise of the donor. Even otherwise, writ is being sought against a private respondent who could not be befallen within the qualification of a person per Article 199 of the Constitution. Furthermore, the sole prayer in the petition is pertaining to a contractual matter which ought not to be agitated in writ jurisdiction. In view hereof, this petition is found to be misconceived and dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad PS
